name: tavily_web_search
description: Search the web for current information on any topic using Tavily. Returns relevant web pages with titles, URLs, and content snippets. Includes an AI-generated answer summary. Supports topic filtering (general, news, finance), time-based filtering, and domain inclusion/exclusion.

query.description: Search query for finding web content

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 20)

search_depth.description: Search depth: 'basic' for fast results, 'advanced' for more thorough search

include_answer.description: Whether to include an AI-generated answer summary (default true)

days.description: Only return results from the last N days (e.g. 7 for past week)

include_domains.description: Only include results from these domains (e.g. ['reuters.com', 'bbc.com'])
